slots.caption_ig:
Tourist traps win on convenience. Hidden gems win on craft. Our data flags both. The 'best cheesesteak' on every list isn't the best cheesesteak — it's the one closest to a hotel. We tell you the actual best one and how far it is.

#ForkFox #HiddenGem #PhillyEats #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: Every food list ranks restaurants by what tourists will find easily, not by what's actually best. A tourist trap is usually fine and always nearby. A hidden gem is usually 20 minutes out of the way and usually worth it. Our data flags both so you can pick by your actual constraint.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Two-panel photo: left shows a busy tourist restaurant exterior at dusk, right shows a quiet neighborhood corner shop with a small queue. Editorial, calm. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Cross-fade: tourist line at famous spot → quiet neighborhood corner shop. Red pin drops on the second one. Text: 'Hidden gems win on craft.'
